notes: Version compatibility contract between openclaw-onboarding and blackceo-command-center. fleet-refresh.sh reads pinnedTag (or resolves latest >= minVersion when pinnedTag is null) and checks out that tag. The skill-32 installer refuses to clone a CC older than minVersion. CI fails if onboardingVersion != /version or if pinnedTag < minVersion. v11.19.0 adds self-service add+wire (roles/SOPs/personas + converge); requires CC v4.39.0 for /api/system/converge endpoint. Skill 48 (facebook-ad-generator) lands ad runs on the Kanban board via the producer-side caller scripts/cc_board.py, which requires the POST/PATCH /api/ad-campaigns endpoints introduced in CC v4.50.0 (merge 89b6d5e); minVersion + pinnedTag are bumped to v4.50.0 so fleet-refresh + the skill-32 installer guarantee the endpoint is present. The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on a CC older than minVersion (or an unreachable board) the run degrades to ungrouped cards and logs it (INSTALL.md graceful degradation), it never fails an ad job. If CC is older, converge falls back to on-box seed-workspaces.py + ingest-sop-library.sh (graceful degradation, §1.6 step 5). v16.2.4 bumps minVersion + pinnedTag to v4.56.1 (current CC release as of 2026-06-29; fixes fleet-refresh deploying stale CC v4.50.0 to every box). v16.4.0 registers Skill 50 (email-engine): the Email Engine authors DRAFT-ONLY email jobs and hands them to the Skill-44 Convert & Flow deploy path; it ships NO board caller of its own (an email job is board-visible only when carded onto the existing marketing Kanban lane via mc-route) — it introduces NO new CC endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). The board hookup is FAIL-SOFT: on an unreachable board the run degrades to a local draft plan and logs it, it never fails an email job. Nothing is sent without explicit human approval. v16.5.0 registers Skill 49 (signature-funnel): the Signature Funnel AUTHORS the SACRED 12-section Hero copy + the per-section image prompts inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES image generation to Skill 47 and ALL GoHighLevel media + funnel/page build to Skill 6 (the ONE GHL delivery rail) via Skill 6's EXISTING REST canvas / builder + media endpoints; a 'signature funnel' request routes to it through the new shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector registry in Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages/funnel-engines/registry.json). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (Skill 49 ships NO board caller; a funnel job is board-visible only when carded onto the existing web-development / QC Kanban lanes via mc-route, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Publish is human-approved (preview URLs + labeled ~/Downloads bundle only); nothing is published without explicit human approval. v16.6.0 registers Skill 55 (product-bio): the Product Bio Engine turns a 4-field intake into the 6,000-7,000-word, 10-section master-brain product bio + its Google-Docs-importable HTML as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads deliverable on the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys), replacing the retired 25-node n8n / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail workflow. It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (Skill 55 ships NO board caller; a product-bio job is board-visible only when carded onto the existing tasks / marketing Kanban lane via mc-route, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Delivery is local + human-reviewed; nothing is sent to any external service (no n8n / Drive / Slack / Gmail / Airtable) at runtime. v16.7.0 registers Skill 52 (avatar-alchemist): the Avatar Alchemist brand-intelligence engine turns ONE completed brand-intake interview into the full brand-intelligence package (40 generators across 7 subsystems -> 16 named deliverables / 37 documents) as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads bundle with a signed provenance certificate, on the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys), replacing the retired 233-node n8n / Airtable / Google Drive / Slack / Gmail workflow. A Book/Brand version selector runs FIRST (version=book routes to Skill 53 or parks fail-closed, never the brand pipeline). Downstream handoffs (bot docs -> Skill 38; Top-39 / headline / targeting -> Skill 48; images -> Skill 47; GHL delivery -> Skill 6) all ride EXISTING rails; Skill 52 ships NO board caller; a brand-intelligence job is board-visible only when carded onto the existing tasks / marketing Kanban lane via mc-route (fail-soft). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Cross-linked with (never merged into) Skill 55; the tone subsystem is a lockstep copy of the shared shared-utils/tone-writing-core/ referenced by Skills 53/54. v16.8.0 registers Skill 56 (sales-page-assets): the Direct-Response sibling of Skill 49 AUTHORS the 8-section main A/B + countdown, the 9-section Trevor Otts upsell, the downsell, the Sovereign Architect high-ticket long-form, the order-bump copy, and the slice-covered image plan inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES image generation to Skill 47 (or the client's own image provider) and ALL GoHighLevel media + funnel/page build to Skill 6 (the ONE GHL delivery rail) via Skill 6's EXISTING REST canvas / builder + media endpoints, and routes the bump to Skill 44; a 'sales page assets' / direct-response A/B request routes to it through the shared STEP-0 funnel-engine selector registry in Skill 6 (06-ghl-install-pages/funnel-engines/registry.json) as the SECOND registered engine. It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys); publish is human-approved. v16.10.0 registers Skill 53 (book-writer) and Skill 54 (anthology-writer) as a combined train: Skill 53 is the BOOK version of the Avatar Alchemist (Skill 52 is the BRAND version; the shared Book/Brand selector routes version=book to Skill 53, version=brand to Skill 52) and turns ONE completed book-intake interview into a tone-matched 12-chapter nonfiction book (or a 4x3x3 offer book handed to Skill 51) plus companion assets as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads bundle with a signed PROCESS-CERTIFICATE; Skill 54 is the SEPARATE sibling multi-contributor anthology engine (never consolidated with Skill 53) that turns ONE contributor intake into one gated chapter in that contributor's blended voice, also delivered as a labeled LOCAL bundle. Both bake a lockstep copy of the shared shared-utils/tone-writing-core/ (proved by verify_tone_core_sync.py) and gate every SACRED count/floor with fail-closed model-free Python provers that MEASURE the stripped text (self-reported counts ignored). Both replace their respective source n8n / Airtable / Google Drive-Docs / Slack / Gmail workflows with LOCAL-ONLY pipelines on the CLIENT's own model providers — never Anthropic, never operator keys. A book-writer or anthology-writer job rides the existing tasks / marketing Kanban lane (fail-soft); it introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change, so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Standalone — neither ships a role-library or universal-sops footprint; no prerequisite skill for either. v16.3.0 registers Skill 51 (signature-presentation): the Signature Presentation engine converts Signature Funnel outputs into a branded PDF presentation + slide deck as a LOCAL-ONLY labeled ~/Downloads bundle, on the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys). It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (Skill 51 ships NO board caller; presentation output is board-visible only when carded onto existing marketing Kanban lanes via mc-route, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Delivery is local + human-reviewed; publish is human-approved. v16.9.0 registers Skill 57 (social-media-in-a-box): the Social Media-in-a-Box engine AUTHORS the 30-day content calendar, platform-specific post copy, visual content specs, and posting schedule inside its own fail-closed pipeline, then DELEGATES media generation to Skill 47 and platform integration to Skill 6 via EXISTING REST endpoints. It introduces NO new Command Center endpoint and NO mission-control.db schema change (Skill 57 ships NO board caller; content calendar and posts are board-visible only when carded onto existing marketing Kanban lanes via mc-route, fail-soft), so minVersion + pinnedTag are UNCHANGED (v4.56.1). Client runtime uses the CLIENT's own model providers (never Anthropic, never operator keys); publish is human-approved.
